title: Experience Needed
question: How much experience using Linux do you have?

options.text: Beginner - I have never used it
Intermediate - I have used it before
Pro - I have a lot of experience
Not at all - I have no interest in gaming
Light gaming - I play retro and indie games
Triple A - I play the latest and greatest blockbusters

title: Graphical Features
question: Do you use modern graphical features?

options.text: No - My setup is pretty average
Yes - High framerate and resolution
Enhanced - Variable framerate and HDR

title: Customization
question: How customizable should the interface be?

options.text: Simple - It should be preconfigured
Neutral - I am neutral on this
Many options - I want to customize every detail

title: Keyboard Focus
question: Do you want to control your system via keyboard or mouse?

options.text: Mouse - I am mostly a mouse user
Neutral - I am neutral on this
Keyboard - I have no trouble learning a lot of keyboard shortcuts

title: Design
question: Is modern UI design important to you?

options.text: No - performance is my priority, I dont care about design
Neutral - I am neutral on this
Yes - the interface should look modern

title: Minimalism
question: Do you want to decide for yourself what features get installed?

options.text: Simple - I want to quickly have a running system
Neutral - I am neutral on this
Complex - I want to decide what features my system should have

title: Package Complexity
question: How complex can the installation of programs be

options.text: Simple - As simple as possible
Neutral - I am neutral on this
Complex - I have no troubles using the terminal for installs

title: Privacy
question: How important is privacy to you?

options.text: Not imporant - I don't care about privacy
Neutral - I am neutral on this
Important - I don't want any data to leave my system

title: Flexibility
question: Do you value a bulletproof or a flexible system?

options.text: Bulletproof - I want an unbreakable system at the expense of full control
Neutral - I am neutral on this
Flexibility - I want full control of my system

title: Adventure
question: Do you want an interesting system?

options.text: No - I want a boring system that just works
Neutral - I am neutral on this
Yes - I want an interesting system
Rare - I want rare but bigger updates
Neutral - I am neutral on this
Regular - I want new features as soon as they're avaliable

title: Nvidia Support
question: Do you use an Nvidia GPU

options.text: No - I use AMD or Intel
Yes - I use an older Nvidia card (pre RTX)
